---
title: "Amirhossein Ghadiri"
subtitle: "PhD Researcher"
image: images/amir.jpg
about:
  template: jolla  # Different templates: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, or broadside
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope-at-fill  # https://icons.getbootstrap.com/?q=book
      text: e-mail
      href: mailto:GhadiriA@cardiff.ac.uk
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/amirhosseinghdv
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/amirhossein-ghadiri-8296781a6/
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=e2vu41AAAAAJ&hl=en
---

Amirhossein is a PhD researcher at the Data Lab for Social Good (DL4SG), Cardiff Business School. His PhD research focuses on how to keep hospitals, GP surgeries, and care services running when floods and rising sea levels get in the way. To answer it, he utilizes machine learning, natural language processing, forecasting, computer vision, and operations research. Before Cardiff, he spent several years applying computer vision and large language models to construction safety. He is supervised by Prof. Bahman Rostami-Tabar.
